summary: Terminal weak-pi pODMR refinement completed and was reviewed. Raw export, terminal plot, scan-order-aware drift diagnostic, and fit summary were recorded. Counts were healthy (pre-run TrackCenter 41.608 kcps, post-run final 43.649 kcps), no stop/error, no drift flags. The signal-only weak-pi center is 3.876501337 GHz with about 11.4% depth and 0.94 MHz FWHM; this supersedes the provisional autosave and sets the next Ramsey mw_freq. Because this center is only about +40 kHz from the broad strong-pi center, the earlier det=1.5 MHz Ramsey ~1.9 MHz ambiguity is not explained by a large resonance-center error. Authored and verified a det=1.0 MHz claim-grade Ramsey/T2star/13C discriminator (tau 0..10 us, 51 points, 16 x 50000 reps, 800k shots/point); MATLAB advisory had no blockers and estimated 692.6 s per average under the 900 s nighttime cap. Submitted the follow-up; bridge job nv23_ramsey_20260514_230820_auto_ramsey is running at average 1/16 with latest copied Final = 40.049 kcps, monitor active, no last_error, stop_requested=false. Updated work/state.md, notes, evidence ledger, lab log, and intent records. Bridge-touching work is blocked until terminal or anomaly evidence.

next_action.reason: The det=1.0 MHz Ramsey/T2star/13C follow-up is running; bridge queue mutation is blocked until terminal or hard-anomaly evidence.
next_action.on_autosave: Bridge-free autosave review is allowed if completed averages are useful; mark provisional and account for odd/even snake-order subsets.
next_action.on_terminal_success: Raw-export savedexperiment, plot raw/readout-aware and signal-self-baseline views, run scan-order-aware drift diagnostic, review signal presence before fitting, fit T2star only if supported, and compare FFT/model support at det=1.0 MHz, det +/- expected 13C Larmor (~0.615 and ~1.385 MHz), direct 13C Larmor (~0.385 MHz), and the previous ~1.9 MHz ambiguity.
next_action.on_terminal_failure: Distinguish tracking/count freshness from route/hardware/code failure before retrying or changing the Ramsey design.
expected_evidence: savedexperiment raw export and raw/readout-aware plot
T2star fit/model review and 13C det-shift FFT/model comparison
